title: melissa graveolens
intro: Melissa graveolens, also known as lemon balm, is a perennial herb native to southern Europe and the Mediterranean region. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its calming and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of lemon balm include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular remedy for various health concerns. Lemon balm can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried herb, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal and health benefits.
